summary.zh-CN: 暗黑科技风的 EchoBraid 中控大屏
summary.en: Dark sci-fi central-control HUD for EchoBraid

description.zh-CN: Echo 控制台是面向桌面的单屏中控大屏。HUD 风格汇集当前 AI、定时任务、L3·L2 记忆、SKILL、核心文件 5 张 KPI；点击任意 KPI 可切换左侧大面板（记忆星图 / 定时任务列表 / AI 详情 / 能力清单 / 核心文件）。右侧常驻主题地块、时间流和实时事件流。
description.en: Echo Console is a single-screen, dark sci-fi HUD that surfaces EchoBraid's current AI, schedules, L3/L2 memories, skills and core files in five clickable KPI tiles. Each tile swaps the left stage between the memory constellation, schedule list, AI detail, skill catalog and core-file list while topic matrix, timeline and pulse feed stay docked on the right.
